coverage_tiers.title: Sports DataBaseball API - Coverage Tiers and Types
tables: Delivers the lineup player names per match
Delivers player stats for Box Score: Individual Hitting, Fielding and Pitching stats
Basic Batting and Pitching box score stats. Examples Hits, Runs, Home Runs, RBI, Innings Pitched. Basic Team stats: Delivers Hits and Errors stats.
Detailed Batting and Pitching box score stats. Examples: Sacrifice, Wild Pitch, Total Pitches. Delivers team stats: Hits, Errors, Running in Scoring Position for X and Y (RISP), Left on Base (LOB)
Detailed event and player/team statistics in real time
Delivers key statistic categories such as Doubles, Triples, Home Runs, Errors, Double Play
Pitch by Pitch- Type, Velocity and Location
Enhanced Fielding and Base Running Information
Post-match Lineups and Basic Player Stats/Team Stats
Post-match basic team & player stats + line-ups
Live Scores Post-match basic team stats
Live Scores Post-match basic team stats & line-ups
Live scores & line-ups Post-match detailed team & player stats
